title: Docent theme
description: Visual theme derived from the host repo at init time. Written once; not modified by scheduled runs.

vibe.description: Which of the four vibe stylesheets the template should load.

accent.description: Accent color for light mode, as a hex string.

accentDark.description: Accent color for dark mode, as a hex string. If only a light-mode color is known, derive a contrast-adjusted complement.

heroImage.description: Path under /docs/public/ to a brand asset (logo, banner) copied from the host repo, or null if none was found.

source.description: Where the design decision came from, for debuggability.

reasoning.description: One short sentence explaining the choice. A human reviewing the init PR reads this.
